name: musubi
description: Musubi monorepo — open, self-hostable shared calendar.

scripts.graph: GRAPH_DIR="$PWD" bash -c 'd=$(ls -d "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/cache/understand-anything/understand-anything/*/packages/dashboard 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); if [ -n "$d" ]; then cd "$d" && exec npx vite --host 127.0.0.1; fi; echo "Plugin not found — using the standalone viewer (Node only, reads the committed graph)"; exec npx https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything/releases/latest/download/understand-anything-viewer.tgz "$GRAPH_DIR"'

author: frgtn.dev
